name: Pawn Jewelry - Orlando, FL
description_short: Diamond Banc Orlando offers collateral loans and outright purchases for fine jewelry, diamonds, and luxury watches, charging 2.5%/month with no setup fees or prepayment penalties.
description_long:
Diamond Banc was founded in 2008 by Mills Menser, a third-generation jeweler and owner of Buchroeders Jewelers (established 1896), and formally incorporated in March 2009. Headquartered in Columbia, Missouri, the company holds an A+ BBB rating and has been accredited since 2014. The Orlando location — marketed under PawnJewelryOrlando.com — operates at 9100 Conroy Windermere Rd, Suite 200, Windermere, FL, and is led by Director Deena Maali, who brings over a decade of experience in fine jewelry and luxury watches. Diamond Banc is not a bank or licensed financial institution; it operates as a private luxury asset lender with no CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications.

The company offers two core services: collateral-based loans secured by fine jewelry, diamonds, and luxury watches, and outright purchases of those same assets. Loans are priced at 2.5% monthly interest (30% APR) on amounts representing 30–50% of the item's liquid wholesale value. There are no setup fees, no prepayment penalties, and no maximum loan term — clients pay monthly interest to keep the loan active and can redeem their collateral at any time. Accepted items include diamonds (0.5 carats or larger), designer jewelry from Tiffany, Cartier, David Yurman, Graff, and Harry Winston, Rolex and luxury watches, and gold jewelry. Free evaluations are offered, with initial loan offers typically delivered within 24 hours.

Diamond Banc's defining differentiator is its private, appointment-based model rather than a storefront walk-in experience. Items are stored in a fully insured, high-security vault during the loan term, and clients can manage loans through an online portal, automate monthly interest payments, and transact remotely by shipping items via prepaid insured labels. A collateral exchange feature allows borrowers to temporarily access their pawned jewelry during the loan period — an unusual offering not common in the pawn industry. The company has earned a 4.9/5 rating on Trustpilot from over 1,000 national reviews and holds a 5.0/5 Google rating across 199 Orlando-area reviews.

For the right customer — someone holding a Rolex, a diamond engagement ring, or designer jewelry and needing fast, private liquidity — Diamond Banc offers real advantages over a traditional pawn shop: higher loan offers, lower stated interest rates, professional secure storage, and no punishing fees. The meaningful limitations are scope and cost: 30% APR remains expensive compared to personal loans from banks or credit unions, and the service is structurally inaccessible to anyone without luxury-tier collateral. Hours are limited to weekdays only (10am–5pm), and if a loan goes unredeemed, the collateral is forfeited with no guaranteed buyback — a genuine risk for borrowers already under financial pressure.
address: 9100 Conroy Windermere Rd Ste 200A, Windermere, FL 34786

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee found. If a collateral loan is not repaid, the pledged item is forfeited. Loans are asset-backed; terms vary by item value.

pros: 2.5% monthly interest rate (30% APR) — claims to be 50–80% lower than typical pawn shop rates
No setup fees, no prepayment penalties, and no maximum loan term
A+ BBB rating with continuous accreditation since 2014
4.9/5 Trustpilot rating (1,000+ national reviews) and 5.0/5 Google rating from 199 Orlando-area reviews
Items stored in a fully insured, high-security vault during the entire loan period
Same-day or next-day funding with remote mail-in transaction option via prepaid insured shipping
Online loan management portal with automated monthly interest payments and collateral exchange feature
cons: 30% APR is high relative to personal loans or credit cards from banks and credit unions
Only accessible to owners of high-value luxury assets — requires diamonds (0.5ct+), Rolex or luxury watches, or designer jewelry as collateral
Weekday-only hours (Monday–Friday, 10am–5pm) — no evening or weekend availability
Collateral is permanently forfeited if the loan is not repaid; no guaranteed buyback option
Not a licensed bank or regulated lender — not subject to the same consumer protections as traditional financial institutions
best_for: Luxury jewelry owners who need fast liquidity without permanently selling their pieces
Rolex or designer watch owners seeking higher loan amounts than traditional pawn shops offer
Individuals who prioritize discretion and a private, appointment-based lending experience
Consumers with high-value collateral who want flexible repayment with no fees or fixed term
diagnosis: Diamond Banc Orlando is genuinely best suited for owners of luxury jewelry, diamonds, or high-end watches who need fast, private liquidity and can tolerate 30% APR in exchange for flexible, penalty-free loan terms. The main caveats are dual: the service is structurally inaccessible to most consumers since luxury collateral is required, and 30% APR — while competitive within the pawn industry — remains costly compared to mainstream borrowing alternatives.
services: Collateral loans secured by fine jewelry and diamonds
Collateral loans secured by luxury watches (Rolex and other brands)
Outright purchase of fine jewelry and diamonds
Outright purchase of luxury and designer watches
Free jewelry and watch appraisals and evaluations
Designer jewelry buying (Tiffany, Cartier, David Yurman, Graff, Harry Winston)
Remote mail-in transactions with prepaid insured shipping labels
Online loan management portal with automated monthly interest payments
Collateral exchange (temporary access to pawned items during active loan period)
Partial principal paydowns and flexible loan redemption
